pullRequest.title: DOM-55488 (5.11) Update default flyte copilot image from 1.10.6 -> 1.11.0

nodes.body:
Oh whoops -- we should not be using this image reference.  We should be using the Domino version from quay as the fallback:

```
quay.io/domino/train-flytecopilot-docker:1.11.0-r1
```

https://quay.io/repository/domino/train-flytecopilot-docker
Filed https://dominodatalab.atlassian.net/browse/DOM-55639 to track wiring this through the chart(s) properly in a subsequent PR
